Jasper Waynwood
Allegiance House Waynwood

Book A Feast for Crows (mentioned)

Jasper Waynwood was a nobleman of House Waynwood, the only son of Ser Elys Waynwood and Lady Alys Arryn.[2] He was presumably named after his maternal grandfather, Lord Jasper Arryn of the Eyrie.

History[ ]

Jasper died at the age of three after getting kicked in the head by a horse.[2]
